V$.-\] *PT^ ^mf, wpz *TNT MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 6th June, 2012 S.0.1303(E).-—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 5 of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act, 1967 (37 of 1967), the Central Government, being of the opinion that it is necessary so to do, hereby constitutes the "Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Tribunal", consisting of Hon'ble Mr. Justice V.K. Jain, a sitting Judge of the Delhi High Court, for the purpose of adjudicating whether or not there is sufficient cause of declaring the Liberation Tigers ofTamil Eelam as an 'Unlawful Association1. [F. No. I. 11034/1/2012-IS-I] DHARMENDRA SPiARMA, Jt. Secy. 2054 GI/20I2 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road.
